title: case
description: A sanitized, portable summary of one engagement — harness memory, NOT the raw engagement archive. Abstract + scrubbed: no live ids, tokens, passwords, signed URLs, or client-private artifacts. The seed example for routing and false-positive discipline.

target_class.description: abstract class, e.g. 'multi-tenant B2B agentic chat SaaS' — not a marketing name

surfaces.description: e.g. chat_ui, chat_api, model_selector, tool_dispatch, render_pipeline

auth_model.description: abstract, e.g. 'single-session SSO; per-company tenancy; admin flag'

scope_ref.description: pointer to the engagement scope (Plane 3), not its contents

label.description: engagement-local label, e.g. F2 (not a secret)

pattern.description: pattern card id this confirms, e.g. pattern.client-supplied-selector-authz

one_line.description: the boundary that failed, in one sentence, no secrets

refuted_candidates.description: things that LOOKED like findings but the oracle refuted — the false-positive discipline corpus

refuted_by.description: which oracle/control killed it, e.g. 'execution oracle: reflected but inert'

pattern.description: pattern card whose counterexample this is

held_defenses.description: controls that correctly held — negative examples that prove the team has the right pattern

contrast_pattern.description: the pattern it is the held counterexample for

attestation.description: one line: what was stripped (ids/tokens/passwords/signed-urls/screenshots) and who scrubbed it
